title: feed.rs: unbounded media fetches per feed entry
description: In src/feed.rs poll_feed, the code iterates entry.media and for each content item that looks like an image calls process_remote with no cap. An adversarial RSS feed could include hundreds of enclosure items per entry, triggering hundreds of concurrent remote fetches (and writes to disk and DB inserts) per poll cycle. With a default poll interval this could exhaust disk space, file descriptors, or DB connections. Fix: impose a per-entry limit (e.g. 4 images max, matching Mastodon's limit) and skip remaining attachments with a warning.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
